name: create_playback_id
description: Generate a new playback ID for an asset or live stream. Playback IDs can be public or signed for secure access.

parameters.name: asset_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the asset to create a playback ID for.

parameters.name: policy
parameters.description: The playback policy. Use 'public' for unrestricted access or 'signed' for token-gated access.
